Module chariot

Package chariot.model

package chariot.model
Contains the records which are used to model the data from the Lichess API.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    chariot
    Contains Client (and ClientAuth), which has static factory methods to get hold of an instance to communicate with the Lichess API.
    chariot.api
    Contains the supported operations of the Lichess API.

    Result<T>
    A "container" for responses, which can be of the types Result.One, Result.Many, Result.Zero or Result.Fail.
    Result.Fail<T>
    Failure
    Result.Many<T>
    A Stream of entries
    Result.One<T>
    One entry
    Result.Zero<T>
    No entry
